name: cve-mcp-server
description: Production-grade MCP server giving Claude 27 security intelligence tools across 21 APIs — CVE lookup, EPSS scoring, CISA KEV, MITRE ATT&CK, Shodan, VirusTotal, and more.

name: awesome-cra-compliance
description: Curated resources for the EU Cyber Resilience Act (Regulation 2024/2847): regulation, harmonised standards, EUCC, SBOM, vulnerability management, conformity assessment

name: xnew
description: xnew is a fast, low-memory CLI that appends only unique lines to files. Built in Go for large datasets, it streams input efficiently and scales cleanly from thousands to hundreds of millions of lines.

name: ZerZor
description: Zerzor is all about studying cybersecurity practices, seeing what breaks, how it breaks, and most importantly… how to fix it like a pro.

name: LingXi
description: LingXi: multi-agent CTF and pentest framework originated from Tencent Security Hackathon
